Ahmed Fatouh.note: Fatouh gives Egypt width from left-back, useful when Salah pulls defenders narrow and the flank opens.
Ahmed Fatouh.noteZh: 法图赫给埃及左后卫位置提供宽度，当萨拉赫把防守带向中路、边路打开时很有用。

Emam Ashour.note: Emam is Egypt's forward-running midfielder, arriving late while still helping the press bite.
Emam Ashour.noteZh: 埃马姆是埃及向前跑动的中场，能后插上到位，同时帮助压迫更有力度。

Haissem Hassan.note: Haissem gives Egypt another dribbler, dangerous when he can receive facing the full-back.
Haissem Hassan.noteZh: 海瑟姆给埃及增加又一名盘带手，能正面接球面对边后卫时很危险。

Hamdy Fathy.note: Hamdy is a stabilizing midfield shield, built for second balls and practical passes after regains.
Hamdy Fathy.noteZh: 哈姆迪是稳定型中场屏障，适合第二落点以及抢回球后的实用传球。

Hamza Abdelkarim.note: Abdelkarim is a youthful forward option for Egypt, useful when the front line needs fresh pressure.
Hamza Abdelkarim.noteZh: 哈姆扎·阿卜杜勒卡里姆是埃及年轻前锋选择，当锋线需要新鲜压迫时很有用。

Hossam Abdelmaguid.note: Hossam gives Egypt a bigger centre-back presence for defending crosses and late pressure.
Hossam Abdelmaguid.noteZh: 霍萨姆给埃及带来更高大的中卫存在感，适合防守传中和比赛末段压力。

Ibrahim Adel.note: Ibrahim Adel is one of Egypt's direct runners, able to turn a loose ball into a fast attack.
Ibrahim Adel.noteZh: 易卜拉欣·阿德尔是埃及直接冲击点之一，能把松散球转成快速进攻。

Karim Hafez.note: Hafez gives Egypt left-side depth, with enough delivery to support attacks from deeper zones.
Karim Hafez.noteZh: 哈费兹给埃及左侧增加深度，也有足够传中能力从更深区域支援进攻。

Mahdy Soliman.note: Soliman is experienced goalkeeper cover, useful if Egypt need a steady voice behind the line.
Mahdy Soliman.noteZh: 马赫迪·苏莱曼是经验型门将后备，当埃及需要防线身后的稳定声音时很有用。

Mahmoud Saber.note: Saber brings midfield legs, useful when Egypt want to keep pressure alive after the first break.
Mahmoud Saber.noteZh: 萨贝尔带来中场跑动，当埃及想在第一波突破后继续保持压力时很有用。

Marawan Attia.note: Attia is a compact midfield worker, protecting central lanes and moving the ball without fuss.
Marawan Attia.noteZh: 阿提亚是紧凑型中场工兵，能保护中路线路，并简洁地转移球权。

Mohamed Abdelmoneim.summary: Mohamed Abdelmoneim is an Egypt centre-back from OGC Nice who gives the national team front-foot defending, aerial power, and aggressive stepping.
Mohamed Abdelmoneim.note: Abdelmoneim is Egypt's aggressive centre-back, strong when he can step out and win the first duel.
Mohamed Abdelmoneim.noteZh: 阿卜杜勒莫奈姆是埃及侵略性中卫，能上前赢下第一下对抗时很强。

Mohamed Alaa.note: Alaa gives Egypt defensive depth, useful for protecting the box when the game becomes direct.
Mohamed Alaa.noteZh: 阿拉给埃及增加防守深度，当比赛变得直接时适合保护禁区。

Mohamed El Shenawy.note: El Shenawy is Egypt's commanding goalkeeper, trusted for sharp saves and organizing traffic in the box.
Mohamed El Shenawy.noteZh: 埃尔谢纳维是埃及指挥型门将，敏捷扑救和组织禁区人流都值得信任。

Mohamed Hany.note: Hany is Egypt's steady right-back, balancing Salah-side support with the recovery run behind him.
Mohamed Hany.noteZh: 哈尼是埃及稳定右后卫，能平衡萨拉赫一侧的支援和身后的回追。

Mohamed Salah.note: Salah is Egypt's gravity source, bending the whole defense before he even receives the ball.
Mohamed Salah.noteZh: 萨拉赫是埃及的牵制核心，甚至在接球前就能让整条防线倾斜。

Mohanad Lashin.summary: Mohanad Lashin is an Egypt defensive midfielder from Pyramids FC who gives the national team central coverage, ball winning, and simple progression.
Mohanad Lashin.note: Lashin gives Egypt central coverage, useful when the midfield needs to absorb pressure first.
Mohanad Lashin.noteZh: 拉辛给埃及提供中路覆盖，当中场需要先吸收压力时很有用。

Mostafa Shoubir.summary: Mostafa Shoubir is an Egypt goalkeeper from Al Ahly who gives the national team reaction saves, line command, and close-range stops.
Mostafa Shoubir.note: Shoubir is a younger goalkeeper option, useful for reaction saves and domestic familiarity with the back line.
Mostafa Shoubir.noteZh: 舒贝尔是更年轻的门将选择，适合反应扑救，也熟悉本土防线。

Mostafa Zico.note: Zico gives Egypt a direct wide scorer, dangerous when he attacks the far post instead of staying outside.
Mostafa Zico.noteZh: 齐科给埃及带来直接的边路得分点，冲击后点而不是留在外线时很危险。

Nabil Donga.note: Donga adds midfield bite, winning loose balls and keeping Egypt connected after contact.
Nabil Donga.noteZh: 东加增加埃及中场硬度，能赢下松散球，并在身体对抗后保持连接。

Omar Marmoush.note: Marmoush is Egypt's second-wave threat, flying off Salah's gravity and attacking unsettled defenders.
Omar Marmoush.noteZh: 马尔穆什是埃及第二波威胁，借萨拉赫的牵制启动并冲击未站稳的防守。

Ramy Rabia.note: Rabia gives Egypt veteran centre-back depth, especially useful when set pieces decide territory.
Ramy Rabia.noteZh: 拉比亚给埃及带来老将中卫深度，尤其当定位球决定场面位置时很有用。

Tarek Alaa.summary: Tarek Alaa is an Egypt right-back from ZED FC who gives the national team right-side defending, overlap energy, and recovery runs.
Tarek Alaa.note: Tarek Alaa offers right-side legs, useful when Egypt need a fresher defensive runner.
Tarek Alaa.noteZh: 塔里克·阿拉提供右侧跑动能力，当埃及需要更有活力的防守跑动点时很有用。

Trezeguet.note: Trezeguet is Egypt's experienced left-side scorer, always looking to arrive when Salah draws attention.
Trezeguet.noteZh: 特雷泽盖是埃及经验型左侧得分手，总会在萨拉赫吸引注意时寻找到位机会。

Yasser Ibrahim.note: Yasser gives Egypt another physical centre-back, useful for deep defending and clearing repeat crosses.
Yasser Ibrahim.noteZh: 亚西尔给埃及增加又一名身体型中卫，适合深位防守和反复解围传中。

Zizo.note: Zizo gives Egypt a delivery-and-shot option from the right, valuable when Salah is tightly tracked.
Zizo.noteZh: 齐佐给埃及右路提供传球和射门选择，当萨拉赫被严密盯防时很有价值。
